---
title: "RECASTed Papers"
subtitle: "Replication and DoubleML extension results"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  id: papers-listing
  contents: papers/*/index.qmd
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [title, author, date, description, categories, image]
  field-display-names:
    author: "Original authors"
    date: "Year"
    description: "Identification strategy"
  sort: "date desc"
  filter-ui: [title, categories]
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  categories: true
  image-height: "160px"
---

Each paper below has been **RECASTed** — replicated, extended with DoubleML, and reviewed by three isolated AI referees.
Filter by identification strategy, topic, or replication status using the controls below.
